summary: Backend Testing Complete for Public Image URL Optimization. 10/10 tests passed. All public-facing endpoints (digital card, landing page, showcase, profile, store card, congrats/birthday cards) return optimized WebP image URLs instead of base64. Fixed MongoDB projection bug in GET /api/card/store/{store_slug}.

GET_api_card_data_user_id.details: Returns optimized photo_url and logo_url as /api/images/*.webp paths

GET_api_p_data_user_id_landing_page.details: Returns optimized photo_url and logo_url as /api/images/*.webp paths

GET_api_showcase_user_user_id.details: Returns all image URLs as /api/images/ paths - 11/11 entries with photos verified

GET_api_profile_user_id.details: Returns optimized photo_url and logo_url as /api/images/*.webp paths

GET_api_card_store_store_slug.details: Fixed MongoDB projection bug. Now returns optimized team member photos and store logo

GET_api_congrats_card_card_id.details: Returns optimized customer_photo URL (/api/images/ or /api/showcase/ fallback)

GET_api_birthday_card_card_id.details: Returns optimized customer_photo and salesman photo URLs

POST_api_images_migrate_all_base64_backf.details: Includes 'backfilled' count in response for records with /api/images/ URLs

GET_api_showcase_store_store_id.details: Returns optimized logo_url and team photo URLs

no_python_dict_duplicate_key_bug.details: Showcase.py uses $nin pattern instead of duplicate $ne keys

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB projection bug mixing inclusion and exclusion operators
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed from {"password": 0, "_id": 1, "name": 1...} to pure inclusion projection {"_id": 1, "name": 1, "photo_path": 1...}

critical_code_review_comments: All 6 public-facing endpoints verified to return zero base64 image data
Image URLs follow valid patterns: /api/images/ (optimized), /api/showcase/* (lazy-migration fallback), or short http URLs
Lazy-migration endpoints (/api/showcase/photo/, /api/showcase/user-photo/) correctly return 301 redirects to WebP paths
New photo uploads (congrats card creation) go through the image pipeline - returns photo_path
resolve_user_photo, resolve_store_logo, resolve_card_photo helper functions centralized in utils/image_urls.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All public-facing image endpoints verified. MongoDB projection bug in digital_card.py fixed. All image URLs use /api/images/ WebP paths or /api/showcase/* lazy-migration fallbacks. No base64 data returned in any response.
